name_en: GUCCI latest wallet in stock, can also be used as a wallet, is a practical design item promoted by the brand. The classic GG pattern is one of the brand's iconic elements used since the 1930s, providing inspiration for the brand to explore new expressions nearly a century later.

Size: 11cm x 10cm x 1.5cm
